_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: RageAdmin
author: zurax@example.com
description: RageAdmin - web-based management panel for RageMP servers. Requires 3 ports: RageMP game port, RageMP transfer/http port (game port + 1), and a separate panel port. Supports custom NPM packages installed on every start.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

apt update
apt install -y git curl tar xz-utils python3 python3-pip ca-certificates

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo -e "Cleaning target directory..."
find /mnt/server -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -exec rm -rf {} +

echo -e "Cloning RageAdmin from ${GIT_REPO_URL} (${GIT_BRANCH})..."
git clone --depth 1 --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_REPO_URL}" .

NODE_VERSION="${NODEJS_VERSION:-20.12.2}"
NODE_DISTRO="node-v${NODE_VERSION}-linux-x64"

echo -e "Installing portable Node.js ${NODE_VERSION}..."
curl -fsSL "https://nodejs.org/dist/v${NODE_VERSION}/${NODE_DISTRO}.tar.xz" -o /tmp/node.tar.xz
tar -xJf /tmp/node.tar.xz -C /mnt/server
mv "/mnt/server/${NODE_DISTRO}" /mnt/server/node
rm -f /tmp/node.tar.xz

export PATH="/mnt/server/node/bin:${PATH}"

ln -sf /mnt/server/node/bin/node /usr/local/bin/node
ln -sf /mnt/server/node/bin/npm /usr/local/bin/npm
ln -sf /mnt/server/node/bin/npx /usr/local/bin/npx

node -v
npm -v

cat > /mnt/server/start-rageadmin.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /home/container

export PATH="/home/container/node/bin:${PATH}"

GAME_PORT="${SERVER_PORT:-22005}"
TRANSFER_PORT="$((GAME_PORT + 1))"
PANEL_HTTP_PORT="${PANEL_PORT:-22007}"

if [[ "${PANEL_HTTP_PORT}" == "${GAME_PORT}" || "${PANEL_HTTP_PORT}" == "${TRANSFER_PORT}" ]]; then
    echo "[ERROR] PANEL_PORT (${PANEL_HTTP_PORT}) must be different from SERVER_PORT (${GAME_PORT}) and SERVER_PORT+1 (${TRANSFER_PORT})."
    exit 1
fi

if [[ -f requirements.txt ]]; then
    python3 -m pip install --user -r requirements.txt
fi

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path

conf_path = Path('RageMP-Server/ragemp-srv/conf.json')
conf_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

data = {}
if conf_path.exists():
    try:
        loaded = json.loads(conf_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8-sig'))
        if isinstance(loaded, dict):
            data = loaded
    except Exception:
        data = {}

game_port = int(os.environ.get('SERVER_PORT', '22005'))
data['port'] = game_port
data['bind'] = '0.0.0.0'

conf_path.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=4), encoding='utf-8')
PY

echo "[INFO] This egg expects 3 allocations: SERVER_PORT, SERVER_PORT+1, and PANEL_PORT."
echo "[INFO] RageMP game port: ${GAME_PORT}"
echo "[INFO] RageMP transfer/http port: ${TRANSFER_PORT}"
echo "[INFO] RageAdmin panel port: ${PANEL_HTTP_PORT}"

if [[ -n "${NPM_PACKAGES}" ]]; then
    if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "[INFO] Node.js version: $(node -v)"
        echo "[INFO] NPM version: $(npm -v)"
        echo "[INFO] Installing NPM packages: ${NPM_PACKAGES}"

        if [[ -d "RageMP-Server/ragemp-srv" ]]; then
            cd "RageMP-Server/ragemp-srv"
            echo "[INFO] Installing NPM packages inside RageMP-Server/ragemp-srv"
        else
            echo "[WARN] RageMP-Server/ragemp-srv not found, installing NPM packages in /home/container"
        fi

        if [[ ! -f package.json ]]; then
            echo "[INFO] package.json not found, creating minimal package.json..."
            npm init -y
        fi

        npm install ${NPM_PACKAGES}

        cd /home/container
    else
        echo "[ERROR] node/npm is not available."
        echo "[ERROR] Reinstall the server so portable Node.js is installed into /home/container/node."
        exit 1
    fi
else
    echo "[INFO] No NPM packages configured."
fi

python3 main.py --port "${PANEL_HTTP_PORT}"
EOF

chmod +x /mnt/server/start-rageadmin.sh

echo -e "Installation completed."

variables.name: Panel Port
variables.description: RageAdmin web panel HTTP port. This must be a third allocation and must not match SERVER_PORT or SERVER_PORT+1.

variables.name: NPM Packages
variables.description: NPM packages to install on every server start. Example: mysql express dotenv. Leave empty to skip.

variables.name: Node.js Version
variables.description: Portable Node.js version installed during server installation. Example: 20.12.2
